revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Otasan-jinja]][[en:Ōta Shrine]][[fr:Ōta-jinja (Setana)]][[ja:太田山神社]]
{{Infobox religious building|image=File:Entrance to Otasan shrine.JPG|prefecture={{ill|Setana|qid=Q1036505}}|coordinates={{Coord|42.2675|N|139.781|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q3594054]]
Wikidata name: Ōta Jinja
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Short description|Shinto shrine in Hokkaido, Japan}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}}
{{Orphan|date=November 2015}}

{{nihongo|'''Ōta Jinja'''|太田神社}} is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] in [[:en:Setana, Hokkaidō|Setana]], [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. Founded in 1441–3, its buildings are scattered over the steep mountainside overlooking the [[:en:Sea of Japan|Sea of Japan]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.town.setana.lg.jp/modules/tinycontents/index.php?id=35 |title=Ōta Jinja |publisher=[[:en:Setana, Hokkaidō|Setana Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.town.setana.lg.jp/modules/tinycontents/index.php?id=34 |title=Ōta Jinja |publisher=[[:en:Setana, Hokkaidō|Setana Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hiyama.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/ss/srk/html/parts/05ootasan_jinja.htm |title=Ōta Jinja |publisher=[[Hiyama Subprefecture]] |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03035.html |title=Ōta Jinja |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref>

==See also==
* [[List of Shinto shrines in Japan#Hokkaid.C5.8D|List of Shinto shrines in Hokkaidō]]

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
{{in lang|ja}} [http://www.d1.dion.ne.jp/~getchan/Taisei/Ota.htm Photographs of Ōtasan Jinja]

{{Japan-religious-struct-stub}}

Founded in 1441–3, its buildings are scattered over the steep mountainside overlooking the [[:en:Sea of Japan|Sea of Japan]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.town.setana.lg.jp/modules/tinycontents/index.php?id=35 |title=Ōta Jinja |publisher=[[:en:Setana, Hokkaidō|Setana Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.town.setana.lg.jp/modules/tinycontents/index.php?id=34 |title=Ōta Jinja |publisher=[[:en:Setana, Hokkaidō|Setana Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hiyama.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/ss/srk/html/parts/05ootasan_jinja.htm |title=Ōta Jinja |publisher=[[Hiyama Subprefecture]] |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03035.html |title=Ōta Jinja |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref>
